summary: Critical issue: workflow uses `actions/checkout@v4` (tag) instead of pinned SHA—violates explicit requirement 'YAML: pinned action refs'. PowerShell scripts follow conventions well (Set-StrictMode, error handling, quoted vars), but workflow doesn't. run-tests.ps1 has redundant regex replacements updating both YAML defaults and inline values (lines ~125-128). Temp dir isolation is solid but regex-based fixture injection is fragile. Scripts are functional and modular; actionlint validation may pass depending on config, but supply-chain security requirement is unmet.
